comment: Build-correctness and rendered-workflow gate: zero-dependency unit tests over the DOM-free episode/preset model, a preview-build smoke check, a headless Chrome rendered workflow that uploads two generated local WebM files through the shipped Host and Guest controls and decodes blob-backed pixels in the composed preview surviving a preset switch, and a headless social-context workflow that enters distinct per-speaker social links through the real inputs and confirms they store per speaker, surface as derived names in the preview, and survive a preset switch with the uploads intact, and a headless preset-transform workflow that switches across all three presets (Split, Stack, Spotlight) and confirms each visibly recomposes the layout with non-black decoded uploaded frames while speaker assignments and derived names persist. No seeded product media, committed fixture output, or verifier-only product paths are used.
